utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: (1) health_coverage, (2) property_coverage, (3) travel_coverage, (4) additional_services, and (5) total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all five of these categories. Each is fully specified: health_coverage includes both physical and mental health details and costs; property_coverage specifies home/contents insurance with costs and limits; travel_coverage includes coverage details and costs; additional_services lists enhancement offerings and costs; total_budget provides a complete cost breakdown including monthly, annual, savings, and confirmation information. Therefore, all 5 items are present and fully detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes three main insurance policies and one additional service. For health coverage, the AI selected 'PrimeCare Premium Plan' for both physical and mental health, which corresponds to a rating of 10 in both subcategories. For property coverage, the plan selected 'LifeFirst Standard Complete Family Package', which aligns with 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage' in the ground-truth property_protection section with a rating of 8. For travel coverage, the plan selected 'Comprehensive Family Insurance Package', which corresponds to 'EliteTravel Premium Plan' (the only global comprehensive family-oriented premium match) and this has a rating of 10. Finally, for additional services, the plan lists concierge services; the ground-truth equivalent is 'Concierge Services' in travel_enhancement_services with a rating of 7.
